name: voicelink
description: VoIP app — run both servers with one command

scripts.public: concurrently --names "API,UI,TUN_API,TUN_UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,blue,yellow" "npm run server" "npm run client" "npx localtunnel --port 3001 --subdomain voicelink-api-999" "npx localtunnel --port 5173 --subdomain voicelink-ui-999"
scripts.host: npm --prefix client run build && concurrently --names "SERVER,TUNNEL" --prefix-colors "cyan,blue" "npm run server" "npx -y cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:3001"
